description: Hypothetical task-management web app being built by a small team. Realistic seed data for adapter evaluation across multiple backends.

tasks.name: Design REST API schema for tasks endpoint
tasks.description: Document the JSON shape for /tasks GET, POST, PATCH. Include pagination cursors and filter params.

comments.author: agent
comments.text: Draft is ready for review — see openapi.yaml in the PR.

tasks.name: Implement JWT authentication middleware
tasks.description: Verify signed JWT on every protected route; reject expired or missing tokens with 401.

tasks.name: Add Postgres migration for task table
tasks.description: Columns: id (uuid), name, description, status, priority, list_id, created_at, updated_at. Index on (list_id, status).

tasks.name: Refactor task service to use repository pattern
tasks.description: Pull database access out of the service layer into a TaskRepository class to make unit testing easier.

tasks.name: Add rate limiting to public API
tasks.description: Token-bucket limiter at the gateway: 100 req/min per IP for anonymous, 1000 req/min per token for authenticated.

comments.author: agent
comments.text: Using redis-cell for atomic token-bucket; benchmark looks healthy.

tasks.name: Wire up webhook delivery system
tasks.description: Outbound webhooks with HMAC signing, exponential backoff retries, and a dead-letter queue.

tasks.name: Fix race condition in concurrent task updates
tasks.description: Two concurrent PATCH /tasks/:id calls can clobber each other. Add optimistic locking via updated_at.

comments.author: agent
comments.text: Reproduced with a small concurrent.futures test — patch incoming.

tasks.name: Write integration tests for task CRUD endpoints
tasks.description: Cover happy path + permission edge cases. Use the real Postgres in CI, not mocks.

tasks.name: Add OpenAPI spec generation
tasks.description: Auto-generate openapi.yaml from route decorators so SDK consumers stay in sync.

tasks.name: Optimize task list query (currently N+1)
tasks.description: The /tasks endpoint issues one SELECT per task to fetch its assignees. Collapse into a single join.

tasks.name: Implement soft-delete for tasks
tasks.description: Add deleted_at column and exclude soft-deleted rows from queries by default. Add /trash endpoint for recovery.

tasks.name: Add background job for stale task cleanup
tasks.description: Nightly job: purge soft-deleted tasks older than 30 days.

tasks.name: Configure structured logging
tasks.description: JSON logs with correlation IDs, shipped to the central log store. Replace print statements with logger calls.

tasks.name: Set up Sentry error tracking
tasks.description: Capture unhandled exceptions with breadcrumbs and PII scrubbing. Verify alerts fire on staging.

tasks.name: Audit task list endpoint for SQL injection
tasks.description: User-supplied filter params should be parameterized. Run sqlmap against staging to confirm.

comments.author: agent
comments.text: All identified inputs are parameterized; sqlmap clean. PR open.

tasks.name: Build Kanban board drag-and-drop
tasks.description: Drag cards between columns; persist new status to the API on drop. Use dnd-kit, not react-beautiful-dnd (unmaintained).

comments.author: agent
comments.text: Drag works visually; persistence call lands but UI flickers on confirm — see task about flicker.

tasks.name: Add dark mode toggle
tasks.description: System preference auto-detection plus manual override stored in localStorage. Tailwind dark: variants throughout.

tasks.name: Mobile-responsive task card layout
tasks.description: Cards should collapse to a single-column stack under 640px. Touch targets at least 44px.

tasks.name: Implement keyboard shortcuts (j/k navigation)
tasks.description: j/k to move selection between cards; enter to open detail; e to edit. Document in a help overlay (?).

tasks.name: Add inline task editing
tasks.description: Click task title to edit in place; blur or enter saves. Esc cancels. Show optimistic update.

tasks.name: Fix flickering on column drop
tasks.description: After a drop, the card briefly re-renders in the old column before settling. Optimistic-update store likely racing the API response.

tasks.name: Improve loading skeleton for task list
tasks.description: Replace the generic spinner with shimmer placeholders sized to typical task rows.

tasks.name: Add empty-state illustration for new boards
tasks.description: Friendly SVG + onboarding tip when a board has zero tasks. Should mention the import-from-clipboard shortcut.

tasks.name: Migrate to Tanstack Query v5
tasks.description: v4 → v5 migration: rename cacheTime to gcTime, status enum changes, useQuery options shape.

tasks.name: Bundle size: code-split task detail view
tasks.description: Task detail modal is 80kb gzipped and only opens on click. Lazy-load it.
